# STORIES_INDEX — Traceability Matrix

*Master ledger. Rows = stories. Generated by `tools/gen-stories-index.py` from the
`- Meta:` line of every story in `epics/EPIC-NN-*/STORIES.md` (format:
`00_METHODOLOGY.md` §2.7; clause keys: §2.9). Do not edit generated rows by hand —
edit the epic's `STORIES.md` and re-run the generator.*

**How this file is used:**
- On PR: cite the story ID; CI verifies the row exists and re-runs the generator (`--check`).
- On release: verify every P0 story in the milestone has status `DONE`.
- On audit: every constitution clause key must appear in at least one P0 row (see coverage table).

Story text lives in the epic's `STORIES.md`; it is not duplicated here.

---
